title: DigiRadio
description: A Resource pack that changes the minecraft BGM to Digimon World BGM.
body:
# DigiRadio
A Resource pack that changes the minecraft BGM to Digimon World BGM.

## Music List
### Digimon World：
- File City(Day)
- File City(Night)
- Gear Savanna(Day)
- Gear Savanna(Night)
- Machinedramon Battle

### Digimon World Next Order：
- When You're Lonely (ne0 Version)
- Starry Sky's Goodnight (ne0 Version)
- Blue Sky, Big Step

### Digimon World 2：
- Digital City
- Digimon Center

### Digimon World 3：
- Menu Screen + Asuka City
- Save Screen + MAGAMI Online Center Menu
- Main Lobby + Administration Center + Master Room + Digimon Arena
- Legendary Gym

### Digimon Adventure：
- Butter-Fly
